title: Email Confirmations sent Via Monday.com
excerpt: Currently the only way to send email confirmation to a guest that submits a job request is to integrate your personal email and have monday.com send those emails on your behalf. Is there anyway to get this function built…

posts.author: Jgrasso (Justin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Currently the only way to send email confirmation to a guest that submits a job request is to integrate your personal email and have monday.com send those emails on your behalf. Is there anyway to get this function built into Monday’s infrastructure so Monday is the one sending the email to the person that submitted the job? Seems like it would be a very useful tool.

There is already a Monday.com notification system for when a job is submitted it will alert all members of a board via email, so I don’t see why this request wouldn’t be possible to send emails to guests filling out forms.
